Off Calendar Mar-29-2024 Continued To Apr-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar Nov-03-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Vanessa Pouladian, Esq. 818-981-5142 CP Law Group for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PAULA BOYLE MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS.

Plaintiffs' Motion to Quash Subpoenas is granted in part and otherwise denied as follows: Defendants and its agents for service of the subpoenas are ordered to (1) deliver the originals and all copies of all records (if any) received pursuant to said subpoenas (the "Records") to Plaintiff; (2) delete all electronic copies of the Records; (3) destroy all summaries of the Records; (4) make no use of any information obtained from the Records. Sanctions are denied for failure to identify the person, party, or attorney against whom the sanction is sought and failure to state the amount of any monetary sanction sought (C.C.P sec. 2023.040).

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312 in word format to the Court at
jameshfleming@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/jpt)
